data.body: Plan-review PASS (advisory=10, signed). Triage: (1) G1G2/G6/T3/T8 (5 findings) — the plan names only criteria_routing.json but validate-routing enforces a bijection with CANONICAL_LLM (registry.py:84); adding a routing key without adding it to CANONICAL_LLM => ORPHAN => validate-routing exit!=0. So registry.py IS an edit target. Criterion id = 'hedge' (matches the ticket's plan_review_hedge.md; criterion_prompt_id -> plan-review-hedge). Also regenerating the derived reviewers/index.json (drift gate). (2) T5e major — the exec:1-TURN-not-DET decision is load-bearing + non-obvious; recording it durably in ADR 0033 (not just the ticket). (3) E5 minor — adding an abstain-branch eval case for E4 scope-exclusion (external-fact exclusion -> abstain-with-coverage), not only a recall case. (4) COH/E3 — the title says 'exec:DET' but the body/decision is exec:1-TURN; implementing per the BODY (correct); ADR 0033 records the rejected exec:DET alternative. (5) depends_on WS1 already recorded (WS2 was blocked_by WS1, now closed).
